Let me do one targeted research check on the Knowles secondary-nucleation reaction order, since secondary nucleation scales with monomer concentration too (the m·c^n term).

The key structural insight from amyloid kinetics (Knowles/Meisl) is well known: in the integrated rate law, the effective rate constants scale with monomer as the elongation+secondary nucleation product. The best program (0.9093) already captures this with `(c3-c)*((c0+c5*M0) + (1+c4*m0)*(c1+c2*c)*c)`.

The current parent at 0.8540 differs only in feature placement.
